steps.title: Identify the grammar issue
steps.content: The subject is a compound: a state's voting record and polling data (two items joined by "and" = plural). The phrase "not its population size" is a contrasting parenthetical between commas — it does not change the subject. Strip it away: "a state's voting record and polling data ______ its importance to campaigns."

steps.title: Eliminate each choice
steps.content:
A: determines — singular verb (-s ending). "Voting record and polling data determines" — compound subject needs plural. Eliminated.

B: has determined — singular auxiliary "has." Same number error. Eliminated.

C: determining — participle, not a finite verb. Leaves the sentence without a main verb. Eliminated.

D: determine — plural base form. "Voting record and polling data determine its importance" — subject and verb agree. Correct.
